pr.title: Record: SwiGLU + MLP 3x + Int6 + LoRA TTT, val_bpb=1.1670 (8xH100)

output.summary: Stacks 3x SwiGLU MLP, int6+QAT, and LoRA test-time training per document to fit a wider 10-layer transformer within the artifact budget.
output.valOnlyReasoning: LoRA adapters are trained per validation document before scoring, effectively performing val-only test-time training.
techniques: 3x SwiGLU MLP expansion with extra layer
Int6 quantization with QAT and zstd compression
LoRA test-time training on each validation chunk
